description_long: This is a sleek, modern laptop with a matte black finish and a minimalist design. The screen is open, displaying a large 'Avell' logo on a black background, indicating the device is powered on but not displaying a typical desktop or application. The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no visible numeric keypad, and the touchpad is centered below the keyboard. The laptop's lid and palm rest are both adorned with the 'Avell' logo, with no visible stickers or additional markings. The side views reveal a slim profile with several ports, including USB and audio jacks, primarily located on the right side. The overall construction appears to be primarily plastic with some metal reinforcement, giving it a lightweight yet sturdy feel suitable for urban environments.
description: A slim, matte black Avell laptop with a minimalist design, open screen, and standard keyboard. The device features visible ports on the side and prominent Avell branding.
description_view_0: Front view showing the open screen with the Avell logo, full keyboard, and touchpad.
description_view_1: Right side view highlighting the laptop's slim profile and visible ports along the edge.
description_view_2: Top-down view of the closed lid, displaying the Avell logo centered on the matte black surface.
description_view_3: Left side view showing the keyboard and additional ports, emphasizing the device's thinness.
attribute_brand_logo: The 'Avell' logo is visible in two locations: centered on the laptop's screen (when open) and on the top lid. The logo is rendered in a stylized, modern font in white, contrasting with the black background.
attribute_screen_state: The screen is open and powered on, displaying only the Avell logo on a black background with no other visible content.
attribute_keyboard_layout: The keyboard is a standard QWERTY layout with a function row and no numeric keypad. The keys are black with white lettering.
